do: Compose CardHeader / CardTitle / CardDescription / CardAction / CardContent / CardFooter for the standard anatomy.
Give CardTitle an appropriate heading level in document context.
dont: Don't add onClick to the Card div — if the whole card is clickable, wrap it in an <a> or give it a proper role.

boundaries: The only variant axis is filled (true | false).

whenToUseInstead.when: a structured row inside a list rather than a standalone surface
